content.fact_text: Production-ready configuration management module using Zod and dotenv to enforce runtime environment safety.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes environment configuration at application boot by validating process.env against a Zod schema. Exits the process if validation fails to prevent invalid state, and freezes the resulting object to ensure runtime immutability.
provenance_data.utility: Centralizes application configuration, provides compile-time and runtime type safety, and ensures the service fails fast if misconfigured.
